VENDOR ONBOARDING

How does Catery work for vendors?

Getting started is simple.

🛒
01

Create Your Account

Takes under 5 minutes

Sign up using your phone number and basic business information.

→ Getting started takes only a few minutes.
02

Build Your Profile

Your professional storefront

Add your logo, photos, service areas, and catering specialties.

→ Profiles with photos attract more interest.
03

Create Your Packages

Define what you offer

Add package names, descriptions, and pricing information.

→ Start with your most popular packages.
04

Set Your Availability

Control your calendar

Keep your schedule updated so customers know when you're available.

→ Regular updates help you stay organized.
05

Receive Booking Requests

Sit back and get notified

Customers can browse your profile and submit inquiries.

→ Responding quickly helps create a better experience.
06

Confirm & Deliver

Build your reputation

Coordinate with your customer and deliver a great event experience.

→ Great service helps build long-term customer relationships.

Ready to Get Started?

Join catering businesses building their presence on Catery.

Download the App

Download on theApp Store GET IT ONGoogle Play
